abort_reason: Copilot Threads API messages endpoint returns 404. Threads are created successfully (POST works) but GET /copilot_threads/{id}/messages and GET /copilot_threads/{id} both return 404. Cannot retrieve Captain responses.
note: Esta e a primeira execucao (baseline). FAQs ainda nao foram publicadas no Help Center, portanto o Captain nao teria acesso a elas de qualquer forma. O teste sera mais significativo apos a publicacao, na proxima rodada.
